top.title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been overturned
top.summary: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

top.title: Russia launches 948 drones at Ukraine in largest attack over 24-hour period
top.summary: Cities across the west of Ukraine were hit, with residential buildings damaged and many injured.

top.title: Australia and EU agree sweeping trade deal in face of global uncertainty
top.summary: Australia and the EU sign sweeping trade and security deals after years of negotiations.

top.title: Fortnite-maker Epic Games lays off 1,000 more staff
top.summary: It is the second time in recent years the company has announced lays offs due to struggles with its blockbuster online game.

top.title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
top.summary: There are almost no major brands of internet routers that are manufactured in the US.

top.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
top.summary: Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.
